task_completion.description: Configure the Outlier Detection analysis with the correct parameters in the DHIS2 Data Quality app.
task_completion.visual_evidence: DHIS2 Data Quality app is open with parameters set: Organization Unit includes 'Kailahun', Dates cover Jan 2022 to Dec 2023, Algorithm is 'Z-score', Threshold is '3.0', and a relevant health dataset (e.g., Child Health, Mortality, or Malaria) is selected.

task_completion.description: Execute the outlier detection analysis to generate results.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A populated table or list of outlier results is visible in the DHIS2 interface.

task_completion.description: Flag at least three suspicious values for follow-up.
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least three distinct rows in the outlier results table have their 'Mark for follow-up' checkbox, toggle, or flag icon actively selected.

task_completion.description: Export the outlier results list to the Downloads directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A browser download notification/popup for the exported file, or a file manager window showing the exported results file located in '/home/ga/Downloads/'.

task_completion.description: Create a summary report describing 2-3 specific outliers and recommendations at the specified Desktop path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor is open showing a file saved as 'kailahun_data_quality_report.txt' (or a terminal showing the file contents at /home/ga/Desktop/kailahun_data_quality_report.txt). The text must include details of 2-3 outliers (facility, data element, and value) and recommendations.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the DHIS2 web interface to perform the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the web browser open to the DHIS2 Data Quality app, rather than terminal scripts or API commands being used to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the report contains genuine data from the analysis.
integrity.visual_evidence: The specific outliers (facility, data element, value) mentioned in the text report match the actual data visible in the DHIS2 outlier results table screenshots.

integrity.description: Verify the export was performed via the application UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The export file was generated by interacting with the download/export button in the DHIS2 interface, indicated by browser download UI elements.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Organization Unit: Kailahun. Target Date Range: January 2022 (2022-01-01) to December 2023 (2023-12-31). Minimum follow-ups required: 3. Report Path: /home/ga/Desktop/kailahun_data_quality_report.txt.
